title: macro-basket output
description: Canonical structured output for the macro-basket skill. Layer 1 (the data); Layer 2 (rendered table + derived-signals block + take) is described in references/rendering.md.

as_of.description: Local as-of date the run was anchored to.

fetched_at.description: UTC timestamp when the script ran.

benchmark.description: Benchmark the basket is measured against. Default SPY.

windows_days.description: Lookback windows in trading days for RS and returns.

signal_window_days.description: Window used for the derived cross-asset signals (default 60).

instruments.description: Per-instrument RS, returns, trend, and range position, sorted by longest-window RS descending.

rs_by_window.description: RS vs benchmark in basis points, keyed `{w}d_bps`. Null when history is insufficient.

return_by_window.description: Total return (decimal) keyed `{w}d_pct`. Null when history is insufficient.

trend_label.description: Five-bucket trend from RS across windows.

curve_position_pct.description: Percentile (0-100) of the latest close within its trailing max-window range.

derived_signals.description: Cross-asset reads derived from specific ETF pairs over signal_window_days.

rates.description: Long-rate direction from TLT. TLT up = long rates falling (easing).

curve.description: Curve shape from SHY vs TLT combined with rate direction: bull/bear steepening/flattening.

real_yield.description: Real-yield direction from TIP vs IEF.

credit.description: Credit stress from HYG vs LQD. HY underperforming IG = widening spreads = stress.

gold_silver_ratio.description: GLD/SLV price ratio and its percentile vs trailing year. Rising = defensive.

gold_dxy_beta.description: Rolling 60d beta of GLD daily returns to UUP daily returns. Normally negative.

take.description: One-sentence macro summary composed from the derived signals.

tier_caveats.description: Honest caveats: rate-limit flags, missing history, proxy limitations.
